contact.subtitle: Contact our development team to request internal testing access
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your testing requirements and timeline...

intro.title: Plan Events with
intro.subtitle: Weather Insights
intro.description: Never let weather surprise your events again. Our intelligent calendar integrates real-time weather data to help you plan, schedule, and manage events with complete weather awareness.

intro.title: Smart Trip Planning
intro.subtitle: Weather-Ready Adventures
intro.description: Never let bad weather ruin your plans again. Our intelligent app forecasts destination weather and recommends the perfect indoor or outdoor attractions for your journey.

screenshots.title: Smart Trip Planning Made Simple
screenshots.subtitle: Our intelligent system analyzes weather forecasts and recommends the perfect attractions for your travel dates, ensuring you always have the best experience.
screenshots.CityDistrictSelectionDesc: Simply input your location area. Our system will show you the weather forecast and suggested attractions.
screenshots.AttractionListDesc: Browse curated attraction recommendations on both interactive maps and detailed lists, filtered by weather conditions.
screenshots.AttractionDetailDesc: Get in-depth information about each attraction, including descriptions, photos, and contact information.
screenshots.MapDesc: Save your favorite attractions and create an optimized trip plan with routes, timings, and backup options for changing weather.

usage.title: Weather-Smart Travel Planning
usage.subtitle: Don't let unexpected weather ruin your perfect trip. Our intelligent system ensures you always have the right activities planned, whether it's sunny, rainy, or too hot outside.

step1.title: Perfect Weather Days
step1.desc: Explore parks, landmarks, outdoor markets, and scenic viewpoints whene conditions are ideal.

step2.title: Rainy Day Backup
step2.desc: Discover museums, shopping centers, galleries, and covered attractions when weather doesn't cooperate.

step3.title: Beat the Heat
step3.desc: Find air-conditioned venues, indoor entertainment, and shaded areas when temperatures soar above 32°C.

tripPlanner.deleteAccount: Request for Deleting My WeatherGo Plan Account

screenshots.title: Two Powerful Views
screenshots.subtitle: Choose the perfect view for your planning needs
screenshots.calendarDesc: Get an overall view of all your events with weather-coded colors. Each event displays its weather condition through intuitive color coding, making it easy to spot potential weather concerns at a glance.
screenshots.timelineDesc: View events in a chronological list format showing what, where, when, and weather conditions. Perfect for detailed planning and sequential event management with comprehensive weather information.

usage.title: How It Works
usage.subtitle: Simple steps to create weather-aware events

step1.title: 1. Create Event
step1.desc: Add your event details including title, date, time, and location. Our system automatically detects the location for weather tracking.

step2.title: 2. Weather Integration
step2.desc: The system automatically fetches weather forecast for your event location and time, providing real-time updates.

step3.title: 3. View & Manage
step3.desc: See your events in calendar or timeline view with weather-coded colors. Make informed decisions about your activities.

deleteAccount: Request for Deleting My WeatherCalendar Account

hero.desc: Create events, guide participants, discover attractions, and stay weather-ready with your branded event experience.

items.title: Increase Participant Engagement
items.desc: Participants can easily explore attractions, event details, and nearby destinations — all within one app experience.

items.title: Simplify Event Coordination
items.desc: Centralize event details, destinations, schedules, and real-time updates in one place your whole team can manage.

items.title: Promote Your Organization
items.desc: Share a branded organization profile and event pages with a single link — perfect for social media bios and messaging apps.

items.title: Encourage Social Sharing
items.desc: Participants naturally share events, attractions, and experiences — turning every attendee into an ambassador for your brand.

items.title: Weather-Aware Experiences
items.desc: Help participants adapt plans with smart, weather-sensitive attraction recommendations. Indoor options on rainy days, outdoor exploration when skies clear — the platform thinks ahead so your participants stay engaged.

featureArch.title: Everything your event needs
featureArch.desc: Four interconnected systems — trip planning, event management, social sharing, and weather intelligence — working together seamlessly.

search.title: Destination search
search.desc: Search any area by region, district, or name to surface nearby attractions and businesses.

rec.title: Attraction recommendations
rec.desc: Curated locations — parks, museums, cafés, cultural sites — shown with distance and category tags.

indoor.title: Indoor / outdoor suggestions
indoor.desc: Clearly labeled indoor and outdoor options so participants can plan around any weather condition.

weather.title: Weather-aware planning
weather.desc: Trip suggestions dynamically shift based on forecast — rainy days surface indoor options automatically.

create.title: Create events
create.desc: Add title, date, time, location, description, pricing, age group, and category.

schedule.title: Manage schedules
schedule.desc: Control event series, recurring dates, and session-based programs — all from one dashboard.

profile.title: Manage organization profile
profile.desc: Set name, logo, contact info, and unique ID — your branded organizer page, public and shareable.

publish.title: Publish & share
publish.desc: One-click publish puts your event live on the Explore feed, map, and a shareable link.

C.title: Share Events, Attractions, & Organizations
C.subtitle: Let more people discover your excellence!
C.desc: Essential promotion tools for event organizers. Master everything at once, share easily, and expand your impact.

features.profile_desc: I'm Fine, You're Fine! Family Co-creation Space
features.attraction_desc: Centuries-old Lin Family Mansion and Garden, exquisite landscape exhibition...

organizer.title: Powerful Organizer Dashboard
organizer.desc: Manage events, organization profiles, and participant engagement from one central portal.

features.title: Complete control
features.desc: From initial setup to final publishing, you have full control over every detail of your events and organization profile.

features.title: Real-time updates
features.desc: Any changes you make are instantly reflected across the platform, ensuring your participants always have the latest info.

features.title: Data-driven insights
features.desc: Track participation and engagement to better understand your audience and improve future events.

social.title: Built for Social Sharing
social.desc: Every attraction, event, and organization page has a shareable link — turning every participant into a natural promoter.

event.title: Every event is shareable
event.desc: Each event has a clean, mobile-optimized page with details, pricing, and a Book Now button — ready to share via LINE, Instagram, or any messaging app.
event.link_text: Share: Event Detail - 【Taipei】Early Childhood Development | Advanced - Colorful World

profile.title: Organizations get a profile link
profile.desc: Your branded organizer page lists all your events in one place — perfect for bios, newsletters, and word-of-mouth referrals.
profile.link_text: Share: Organizer Detail - I'm Fine, You're Fine! Family Co-creation Space

attraction.title: Attractions are also shareable
attraction.desc: Participants discovering a great café or park can share it directly with friends — keeping your event top-of-mind even after it ends.
attraction.link_text: Share: Attraction Detail - Lin Family Mansion and Garden

who.desc: Whether you run a weekly class, a school program, or a community workshop — WeatherGoPlan was built for you.

cards.title: Event Organizer
cards.desc: Fitness events, marathons, community activities, adult classes

cards.title: School Program
cards.desc: Parent-child classes, early childhood programs, school excursions

cards.title: Tour Host
cards.desc: Cultural tours, walking groups, guided experiences, travel itineraries

cards.title: Communities & Workshops
cards.desc: Senior groups, craft meetups, hobbyist clubs, neighborhood programs

how.title: From signup to participants exploring
how.desc: Four simple steps to take your event from idea to engaged community.

steps.title: Create organization
steps.desc: Set up your organizer profile with name, logo, type, and contact info. Your public page is ready instantly.

steps.title: Publish your event
steps.desc: Fill in event details — date, location, price, audience — and hit publish. It appears on the map and Explore feed.

steps.title: Share with participants
steps.desc: Share your event page link via LINE, IG, or any channel. Participants tap through to book instantly.

steps.title: Participants explore
steps.desc: Attendees open the app, discover your event in context with nearby attractions and weather-smart suggestions.

cta.desc: Join organizers across Taiwan using WeatherGoPlan to create events, engage participants, and grow their communities — for free.

footer.desc: Event and trip engagement platform for organizers and participants. Discover, plan, and share experiences — weather-aware and location-smart.
